title: dicranopteris linearis var. linearis
intro: Dicranopteris linearis var. linearis, also known as the Water Fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Dicranopteris linearis var. linearis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions.
